blended.narrative: Bromley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,499 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

Friday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
